title: ML HW3 — Monte Carlo + TD learning prompt (100 pts, due May 26)
html:
Day-before-due capture of the HW 3: Monte Carlo and TD learning prompt (100 pts, due May 26 2025) — three episodes from a 5-state/5-action MDP with discount γ=0.9, asks for first-visit vs every-visit Monte Carlo returns + estimated state values, plus three theory questions on ε-greedy determinism, SARSA for V^π estimation, and SARSA-update invariance under reward notation changes (R(s) vs R(s,a) vs R(s,a,s')). Written-only, no collaboration. The end-of-spring-2025 RL homework — caps the CS coursework arc one week before the May 30 todos and graduation.

TL;DR

  • OSU RL HW3 — Monte Carlo + SARSA / TD learning, due May 26 2025.
  • 5-state / 5-action MDP, γ=0.9, three given episodes — student computes first-visit vs every-visit MC returns + value estimates.
  • Theory questions: when does ε-greedy always pick the same action; can SARSA estimate V^π at termination; is SARSA's update invariant to R(s) vs R(s,a) vs R(s,a,s')?
  • Last CS homework before graduation week — pairs with the same-month busybox reverse-engineering homework as the dual capstone-week academic load.
  • Establishes that Yahir took an RL/AI course in spring 2025 — vault didn't previously document this.

reinforcement learning · sarsa · monte carlo method · cs coursework · osu · 2025 05 13 for graduation
